{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Blackflame energy
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The dragon's skeleton is a wellspring of [[Blackflame energy]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
